info.title: Counterpoint Data API
info.description: REST API for accessing NCR Counterpoint database. Designed for MCP server consumption with column selection, cursor pagination, batch requests, and compact JSON support.

get.summary: Returns paginated daily sales data by item with optional filtering.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Comma-separated filter expressions. Format: field:value (eq) or field:op:value. Operators: eq (default), neq, gt, gte, lt, lte, like (contains), startswith, in (pipe-separated values). Example: filter=storeId:MAIN,businessDate:gte:2024-01-01. Valid fields: itemNo, partialTicketCount, postDate, returnExtPrice, returnQty, RTN_LIN_CNT, salesExtPrice, salesQty, SLS_LIN_CNT, storeId, ticketCount, TOT_EXT_CALC_PRC, TOT_EXT_PRC_1, TOT_EXT_REG_PRC, TOT_EXT_RETL_VAL, totalExtCost.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (1-based). Ignored when cursor is provided.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of items per page. Default 25, max 200.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor token for cursor-based pagination. When provided, page is ignored.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated field names to include in the response. Omit to return all fields. Unknown names return HTTP 400 with the full valid list. Valid fields: itemNo, partialTicketCount, postDate, returnExtPrice, returnQty, RTN_LIN_CNT, salesExtPrice, salesQty, SLS_LIN_CNT, storeId, ticketCount, TOT_EXT_CALC_PRC, TOT_EXT_PRC_1, TOT_EXT_REG_PRC, TOT_EXT_RETL_VAL, totalExtCost.

parameters.name: compact
parameters.description: When true, null/default values are omitted from the JSON response.

parameters.name: includeMeta
parameters.description: If true, attaches field-level dictionary metadata to the response.

200.description: Returns the paginated daily sales by item.
